title: capsella viarum
intro: Capsella viarum, also known as Shepherd's Purse, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Capsella viarum include reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and treating urinary issues due to its diuretic properties. Herbal preparations of Capsella viarum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a variety of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
